text.title: schema-field-order Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for schema-field-order. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every field that depends on another field must be positioned AFTER the fields it depends on in the schema declaration order.
rule.rationale: The model generates field values in declaration order. If field B is placed before field A, the model emits B's value without having generated A yet, forcing hallucination or placeholder values.
